lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਅਨਦ ਕਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਜਪਿ ਸਗਲੇ ਰੋਗ ਨਿਵਾਰੇ ॥੨॥੧੦॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: naanak anad kare har jap jap sagale rog nivaare |2|10|15|
lines.english: Nanak celebrates in bliss; chanting and meditating on the Lord, all sickness has been cured. ||2||10||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਸੰਗਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਮਨਿ ਲਾਗੀ ਸੁਰਿ ਜਨ ਮਿਲੇ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: charan kamal sang preet man laagee sur jan mile piaare |
lines.english: My mind is in love with the Lord's lotus feet; I have met the Beloved Guru, the noble, heroic being.
Todee, Fifth Mehl, Third House, Chau-Padhay:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਾਂ ਹਾਂ ਲਪਟਿਓ ਰੇ ਮੂੜੑੇ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਥੋਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: haan haan lapattio re moorrae kachhoo na thoree |
lines.english: Oh! Oh! You cling to Maya, you fool; this is not a trivial matter.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੋ ਨਹੀ ਸੁ ਜਾਨੀ ਮੋਰੀ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tero nahee su jaanee moree | rahaau |
lines.english: That which you consider to be yours, is not yours. ||Pause||
You do not remember your Lord, even for an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਸੰਗੀ ਸੋ ਮਨਿ ਨ ਬਸਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: naam sangee so man na basaaeo |
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is always with you, but you do not enshrine it within your mind.
That which belongs to others, you believe to be your own. ||1||
You have attached your consciousness to that which you must eventually abandon. ||2||
You have not obtained the supplies of the Ambrosial Naam. ||3||
You collect that which will bring you only hunger and thirst.
You have fallen into the pit of sexual desire, anger and emotional attachment.
Todee, Fifth Mehl:
I have only the One Lord, my God.
By Guru's Grace, O Nanak, a rare few are saved. ||4||1||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਨ ਅਵਰ ਸਿਞਾਣਿ ਨ ਕਰੀ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aan avar siyaan na karee | rahaau |
lines.english: I do not recognize any other. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਮੋ ਕਉ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਓ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur mo kau har naam drirraaeo |1|
lines.english: The Guru has implanted the Name of the Lord within me. ||1||
By great good fortune, I have found my Guru.
The Praises of the Lord are my good conduct, occupation and social class.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਇ ਕੁਸਲ ਸਭਿ ਖੇਮਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har har dhiaae kusal sabh khemaa |2|
lines.english: Meditating on the Lord, Har, Har, I have found total joy and bliss. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਾਪ ਤਾਪ ਬ੍ਰਤ ਨੇਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: har har jaap taap brat nemaa |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord, Har, Har, is my meditation, austerity, fasting and daily religious practice.
Says Nanak, everything comes to the homes
Listening to the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises, I am in absolute ecstasy. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਤਿਸ ਕੇ ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਮਹਿ ਆਇਆ ॥੪॥੨॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh tis ke grih meh aaeaa |4|2|17|
lines.english: Of those who have found their Lord and Master. ||4||2||17||
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Todee, Fifth Mehl, Fourth House, Dho-Padhay:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਢੂਢੇਦੀ ਦਰਸਨ ਕਾਰਣਿ ਬੀਥੀ ਬੀਥੀ ਪੇਖਾ ॥
lines.translit: hau dtoodtedee darasan kaaran beethee beethee pekhaa |
lines.english: I have searched for the Blessed Vision of His Darshan, looking in each and every street.
My beautiful mind longs for the Love of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਲੀ ਹਰਿ ਨੀਹੁ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gaalee har neehu na hoe | rahaau |
lines.english: By mere words, the Lord's Love does not come. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹ ਬੁਧਿ ਪਾਈ ਮੈ ਸਾਧੂ ਕੰਨਹੁ ਲੇਖੁ ਲਿਖਿਓ ਧੁਰਿ ਮਾਥੈ ॥
lines.translit: eih budh paaee mai saadhoo kanahu lekh likhio dhur maathai |
lines.english: I have obtained this wisdom from the Holy Saints, according to the pre-ordained destiny inscribed upon my forehead.
Meeting with the Guru, my doubts have been dispelled. ||1||
Todee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹ ਬਿਧਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਨੈਣ ਅਲੋਇ ॥੨॥੧॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: eih bidh naanak har nain aloe |2|1|18|
lines.english: In this way, Nanak has seen the Lord with his eyes. ||2||1||18||
My foolish heart is in the grip of pride.
By the Will of my Lord God, Maya,

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਣੋ ਘਣੋ ਘਣੋ ਸਦ ਲੋੜੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਲਹਣੇ ਕੈਠੈ ਪਾਇਓ ਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: ghano ghano ghano sad lorrai bin lahane kaitthai paaeo re |
lines.english: More and more, he continually yearns for more; but unless he is destined to receive, how can he obtain it?

lines.gurmukhi: ਡੀਹਰ ਨਿਆਈ ਮੋਹਿ ਫਾਕਿਓ ਰੇ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ddeehar niaaee mohi faakio re | rahaau |
lines.english: Like a witch, has swallowed my soul. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਮਨ ਸੀਖ ਸਾਧੂ ਜਨ ਸਗਲੋ ਥਾਰੇ ਸਗਲੇ ਪ੍ਰਾਛਤ ਮਿਟਿਓ ਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: sun man seekh saadhoo jan sagalo thaare sagale praachhat mittio re |
lines.english: Listen, O mind, to the Teachings of the Holy Saints, and all your sins shall be totally washed away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਰਾਜ ਰੋ ਗਾਥੁ ਵਾਹੂ ਸਿਉ ਲੁਭੜਿਓ ਨਿਹਭਾਗੜੋ ਭਾਹਿ ਸੰਜੋਇਓ ਰੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: maharaaj ro gaath vaahoo siau lubharrio nihabhaagarro bhaeh sanjoeo re |1|
lines.english: He is entangled in wealth, bestowed by the Lord God; the unfortunate one attaches himself to the fire of desires. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੋ ਲਹਣੋ ਮਹਰਾਜ ਰੀ ਗਾਠੜੀਓ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਗਰਭਾਸਿ ਨ ਪਉੜਿਓ ਰੇ ॥੨॥੨॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: jaa ko lahano maharaaj ree gaattharreeo jan naanak garabhaas na paurrio re |2|2|19|
lines.english: One who is destined to receive from the Lord, O servant Nanak, shall not be cast into the womb of reincarnation again. ||2||2||19||
